_comment: Claude Desktop — Penpot MCP via remote SaaS. Claude Desktop speaks MCP over stdio, so the streamable-HTTP remote endpoint is reached through the mcp-remote proxy (npx, no install). Replace YOUR_SECRET_MCP_KEY with your personal MCP Key from Penpot > Your Account > Integrations. Keep the Penpot plugin window open during a session. If your client natively supports streamable-HTTP/SSE MCP servers, you can instead point it straight at the url with no proxy.
